title: lastrea ophiura
intro: Lastrea ophiura, also known as the Ophioglossum fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Ophioglossaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The plant has been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Lastrea ophiura typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves and stems into teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
